home.name: Saral Dulal
home.description: a Computer Engineering student passionate about leveraging technology to solve real-world challenges.

about.title: About
about.description: I believe in the power of simplicity. My work focuses on stripping away the unnecessary to reveal the essential core of a product or brand.

projects.name: Ranjana Script OCR
projects.description: A robust character recognition system for Ranjana script by leveraging the YOLO object detection model trained on a synthetically generated dataset and fine-tuned with handwritten data.

projects.name: Ghumti
projects.description: Intelligent RAG based chatbot powered by Llama 3 for real-time local bus routes, schedules, and optimized travel recommendations.

projects.name: Sahayatri
projects.description: A travel app that bridges the gap between tourists and local guides. The app allows guides to showcase their expertise, offer customized tours, and interact with travelers, while tourists can easily find trusted guides.

projects.name: DIDL
projects.description: Hybrid approach for deepfake image detection and localization, using Vision Graph Neural Networks (ViGNN) for detection and U-shaped Network (U-Net) for localization.

projects.name: BookEase
projects.description: A hotel booking system that allows users to view available rooms based on preferences, sort them on the basis of price, book rooms and view booking details.

items.title: Operations Head
items.description: Leading operations for a tech and digital marketing startup, overseeing project management, team coordination, and strategic planning.

items.title: Outreach Lead
items.description: Led outreach initiatives to secure sponsors and coordinate guest participation across multiple Hult Prize events.

items.title: Participant
items.description: Developed a RAG based chatbot that helps users find the local bus stop and answers all the queries regarding Nepal’s local transportation.

items.title: First Runner Up
items.description: Developed Chowk Chowk Ma, an all-in-one public bus info app idea.

items.title: First Runner Up
items.description: Developed a mobile app that connects local guides with tourists to provide personalized travel experiences.

items.title: Semi-Finalist
items.description: Developed Bichaar: Closing the Loop, a platform connecting thrift enthusiasts to foster a sustainable fashion community.

contact.title: Let's Connect
